title: The Leonardo Collection Redoute Rose Coasters Set of 4 Pierre-Joseph Redoute For Home & Office | Stylish Coaster For Tabletops & Dining Spaces | Decorative Home Accessories for Drinks & Tables
features: Durable & Practical Surface Protection: Ideal for safeguarding tables and countertops, these coasters are built to handle daily use. Perfect for indoor and outdoor environments, enhancing functionality and style alike.

Convenient & Elegant Coaster : Available in various sets, these coasters cater to diverse needs, whether for everyday dining or special gatherings. An excellent choice for those seeking practical yet stylish solutions.

Ideal Choice for Enhancing Decor: These versatile pieces serve as decorative additions that provide both aesthetic appeal and practical functionality, making them suitable for a wide range of interior settings.

Stylish & Functional Decor Essentials: Enhance the appeal of your home or office with well-crafted coasters that provide reliable protection while seamlessly blending with existing decorative accessories and aesthetics.

Comprehensive Coaster Variety for Versatile Use: Perfect for daily settings, In approximate measurement LBH 10.5 Cm x 10.5 Cm x 0.4 , these coasters are designed to complement a range of decor styles, from contemporary to classic. Suitable for various surfaces and settings.
